jd_text: About us: ARRISE sets the benchmark for service delivery and excellence in the iGaming industry. Playing a key role in the success of its clients, which include Pragmatic Play, a brand relied upon by the world’s biggest online casinos for its cutting-edge products, ARRISE helps to deliver exceptional gaming experiences to millions of players worldwide. Our global team of over 10,000 talented and driven professionals are shaping the future of iGaming. Headquartered in Gibraltar, we have offices spanning Canada, India, the Isle of Man, Latvia, Malta, Romania, Serbia, Bulgaria, and the UAE, and more exciting destinations on the horizon. At ARRISE, we take pride in creating growth opportunities at all levels, constantly investing in our people while welcoming new colleagues and forging strategic partnerships that open new opportunities for success. To achieve this, we bet on ourselves. We know that success is a collective effort, and our team is driven by ambition, collaboration, and a shared commitment to grow and succeed—while embracing every step of the journey. Be part of the future of iGaming with 10,000 ARRISERS! See a job that excites you? Apply now, and our friendly recruitment team will connect with you soon. Your journey starts here! About the role: This senior leadership role will oversee the regional Streamer Relationship team— comprising of Team Leaders and Streamer Relations Managers — while also personally managing relationships with a portfolio of our most valuable, high-impact streamers. You will help define and then execute the regional streamer strategy and supporting incentivization plan, ensuring our slot games achieve exceptional visibility, engagement, and advocacy across major streaming platforms. What you'll be doing: With the help of senior management, define and lead the regional streamer strategy, aligning with commercial marketing goals to maximise exposure and engagement across key markets. Develop and implement scalable streamer incentivization programes, campaign frameworks, and retention strategies. Directly manage relationships with a portfolio of the company's highest-value streamers, offering bespoke support and strategic alignment. Lead and support Streamer Relations Manager Team Leaders, and Streamer Relations Managers ensuring they are high-performing, motivated, and aligned with global objectives. Oversee KPIs for streamer activity, ensuring accountability and performance tracking across all teams. Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Marketing and Compliance to ensure seamless integration of streamer activity with broader initiatives. Collaborate with the Commercial Marketing Director on managing the global streamer strategy budget, ensuring effective allocation of resources to maximise return on investment. Monitor industry trends, platform developments, and competitor strategies to maintain thought leadership and innovation within the team. Provide regular reporting and insights to the Commercial Marketing Director, including performance analysis, strategic proposals, and risk/opportunity assessments. Champion a culture of excellence, collaboration, and creativity across the Streamer Relations function in the region. What we ask of you: Extensive experience in influencer/creator partnerships, streamer relations, or community management, ideally within iGaming, gaming, entertainment, or streaming industries. Strong understanding of streaming platforms such as Twitch, YouTube, and Kick, with deep knowledge of creator ecosystems and streaming trends. Fluency in English, knowledge of one additional Southeast or East Asian language such as Tagalog, Thai, Indonesian, Korean or Vietnamese is a plus. Proven experience managing high-value streamer or influencer partnerships and building long-term strategic relationships. Demonstrated leadership experience managing or mentoring partnership, influencer, or marketing teams. Strong organisational and strategic planning skills, with experience leading campaigns, incentive programs, and large-scale creator collaborations. Analytical and data-driven mindset, with experience tracking performance, engagement metrics, and ROI across influencer or streamer programs. Ability to collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Product, Commercial, and Compliance teams to drive aligned initiatives. Excellent stakeholder management, negotiation, and communication skills with senior internal and external partners. Passion for gaming, streaming, and digital communities, with awareness of industry trends and competitor activity. Flexibility to occasionally work outside regular hours to align with global streamer schedules and key events. Willingness to travel for industry events, conferences, and key creator activations. What we offer in return: A detailed company training on highest standards. A chance to work in friendly and supportive culture. Tremendous growth opportunities in a large fast moving international company. Grow with ARRISE | Learning Hub—personalized learning, gamified growth, and endless career development at your fingertips. Private health insurance
